name: Two Gilgamesh's cat's (Caster and Archer Gilgamesh)
description:
What's better that one Gilgamesh? two Gilgamesh's, and what's better that two Gilgamesh's? two Gilgamesh cat's!

This is my first time trying to do two characters at the same time i hope it works well

This is set in chaldea and like you can see the two Gilgamesh are here Archer Gilgamesh and caster Gilgamesh but with cat ear's and tail!

If someone use this i hope you enjoy!

And if someone found a wallpaper where the two Gilgamesh have ear's i would be pleased to have it, or if someone find's one where Caster gil have ear's it would be fabulous too!

Update: there's 10 greetings

The last one is open so you can do whatever you want now
creator: MaEsther
